title: Draft plain-language eligibility-concept explainers (sourced NCI/COG/ESMO/CCLG)
context: These are education-only, plain-language explainers of what eligibility CONCEPTS mean (e.g. measurable disease, washout, performance status), never applied to any individual. They are HIGH risk and blocked from shipping without the credentialed pediatric-oncologist AND patient-advocate sign-off. Every explainer is sourced to vetted bodies with citation, carries the not-advice + not-eligibility-determination labels, and contains no individualized advice, recommendation, prognosis, or trial ranking.
objective: Draft education-only plain-language explainers of eligibility concepts, each sourced to vetted bodies, labeled not-advice/not-eligibility, and within the reading-level rules, for the blocking expert + advocate review.
acceptanceCriteria: Every explainer is education only; sourced to vetted bodies (NCI/COG/ESMO/CCLG) with citation.
Every explainer carries the not-advice + not-eligibility-determination labels and passes the reading-level check.
No individualized advice, recommendation, prognosis, eligibility determination, or trial ranking is present.
Content is blocked from shipping without the oncologist AND patient-advocate sign-off (recorded in 303).
resources: Vetted bodies: NCI, COG, ESMO, CCLG
